title: Swiss sneaker maker plunges 14% on weak guidance, slower than expected 2026 growth
summary_full: On is entering thee third and final year of its strategy to double sales by 2026 in a quest to "be the most premium global sportswear brand."
summary_public: On is entering thee third and final year of its strategy to double sales by 2026 in a quest to "be the most premium global sportswear brand."
